entry.title: Replying to @TaborTwins the true nature of my diabolical plan. thanks to everyone who called, it was a lot of fun i did it for 3 hours

entry.title: i wont be posting videos for 2 or 3 days because oy vey surprised me with a little holiday!!!! thank you oy vey
entry.content: i wont be posting videos for 2 or 3 days because oy vey surprised me with a little holiday!!!! thank you oy vey

entry.title: thank you for the best holiday oy vey!!!
entry.content: thank you for the best holiday oy vey!!!

entry.title: thank you @Darren Levy for driving me round in cricles i had loads of fun!!!! sorry you couldnt prank me i guess im just too smrt i mean smart #funnyuberrides
entry.content: thank you @Darren Levy for driving me round in cricles i had loads of fun!!!! sorry you couldnt prank me i guess im just too smrt i mean smart #funnyuberrides
